message:
fix: disable remain-on-exit before tmux kill-session in dog done

When gt dog done fires, the session has remain-on-exit=on (set during
spawn for crash recovery). kill-session with remain-on-exit leaves a
dead pane that the deacon health-check reports as an orphan. Clear the
flag before killing so the session is fully destroyed.

Fixes gt-80bu.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
